calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Chow for Eric Ho.

The Court informed Counsel that it needs a proposed order and that sanctions need to be paid. Mr. Chow provided an order and indicated that he is going to pay the sanctions today. The Court granted the Petition for Termination of Further Proceedings and for Discharge of Personal Representative (subject to review of the order and proof of payment of sanctions).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Continued To Oct-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Continued To Oct-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-23-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Continued To Aug-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Chow for and with Eric Ho.

Mr. Chow stated that he previously prepared a statement in response to the Order to Show Cause and certain documents in response to the February 27th hearing, that at the hearing he was under the impression that all that was needed was to sign the order and that he was not aware the Court did not have a proposed order. The Court informed Counsel that what remains to be done is sending notices to the Franchise Tax Board, the Victim Compensation and Government Claims Board, and the Department of Health Care Services. Mr. Chow stated that the decedent died in his teens and that there are no claims related to taxes. The Court also explained that pursuant to Probate Code 9202, this should have been done within 90-days of issuance of letters and advised Counsel to read the code and comply. The Petition for Termination of Further Proceedings and for Discharge of Personal Representative is continued to August 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Continued To Aug-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Continued To Jul-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause Re Sanctions will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on July 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Sanctions in the amount of $400.00 per day are imposed against Attorney John Chow commencing today. The Petition for Termination of Further Proceedings and for Discharge of Personal Representative is also continued to July 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

An additional Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney to appear on July 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why additional sanctions should not be imposed and why the California State Bar should not be notified.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Continued To Jun-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause Re: Suspension and Sanctions will be issued to the Attorney and the Personal Representative to appear on June 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain they failed to appear, why the Personal Representative should not be suspended and why sanctions should not be imposed. The Petition for Termination for Further Proceedings, etc. and the Order to appear are also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
